data.label: Billing
data.title: Review 1
data.text: Radhia contacted support by email. They reported that they charged twice after upgrading my plan. The issue severity is low. Please investigate the billing workflow and follow up.
data.admin_response: We have reviewed your account and issued a prorated refund for the downtime.

data.label: Login
data.title: Review 2
data.text: Alex contacted support by email. They reported that they cannot sign in even after resetting my password. The issue severity is medium. Please investigate the login workflow and follow up.
data.admin_response: We have refreshed your authentication tokens. Please try clearing your cache and cookies and logging in again.

data.label: Performance
data.title: Review 3
data.text: Jordan contacted support by email. They reported that they dashboard takes more than a minute to load. The issue severity is high. Please investigate the performance workflow and follow up.
data.admin_response: Our engineering team has deployed a patch to optimize database queries. Things should be snappy now!

data.label: Feature Request
data.title: Review 4
data.text: Taylor contacted support by chat. They reported that they need bulk editing for customer tags. The issue severity is urgent. Please investigate the feature request workflow and follow up.
data.admin_response: Thank you for the suggestion! We have added this to our product roadmap for Q3.

data.label: Data Sync
data.title: Review 5
data.text: Morgan contacted support by chat. They reported that they Salesforce contacts are not syncing overnight. The issue severity is low. Please investigate the data sync workflow and follow up.
data.admin_response: We have forced a manual sync on your account. Your data should now reflect across all devices.
